示例

📊 AI API Cost Comparison

• Monthly input tokens: 1,000,000 • Monthly output tokens: 500,000 GPT-4o: $7.50/month Claude Sonnet: $10.50/month Gemini 2.0 Flash: $0.30/month DeepSeek Chat: $0.28/month 🏆 Cheapest: DeepSeek Chat at $0.28/month 💰 Savings vs Claude Sonnet: $10.22/month (97% cheaper)
